CAREER DEVELOPMENT
LAUNCHPAD TO YOUR BRIGHT FUTURE
CENTRE FOR TRAINING & PLACEMENT
Centre for Training and Placements at Sri Eshwar, provides the finishing touches to the technical and soft skill levels of the students and makes them well polished to enter the job market.
The Centre networks, collaborates and brings in the top-most companies  across the globe, through their Corporate Relations team. We ensure that the companies visiting Sri Eshwar, have the best hiring experience and take back with them the best students that fit their corporate needs. Sri Eshwar continues to be the preferred campus for hiring, as we consistently produce high quality, industry ready students for the job market. Sri Eshwar is a
TOP PLACEMENTS COLLEGE!

OUR TOP RECRUITERS
SRI ESHWAR - A PREFERRED CAMPUS FOR TOP COMPANIES ​
We have steadily attracted top recruiters across the globe, to our campus. On an average around 200 companies visit our campus for hiring, from young startup companies to top multinational corporate giants. We offer students a wide variety of choices in placements – be it IT product companies; IT service giants; top brands in core manufacturing, electrical, electronics and networking.
Here’s a list of some of the companies that visited our campus.
IT Product Companies
(AI, DS, ML, E-commerce, Cloud, Gaming, Cyber-security, Fintech based companies)​
IT Service Companies
ECE/EEE Core Companies
Mechanical Core Companies

TOP NOTCH PLACEMENT TRAINING PROGRAMS
Sri Eshwar has a well-qualified and highly experienced in-house Training and Placement Team and an awesome training infrastructure. This team provides training in various facets of industry-readiness like training in emerging technologies,aptitude and soft skills. Such trainings are introduced to the students from the 1st year so that it becomes naturally inculcated into the DNA of the students.
PLACEMENT TRAINING FACILITIES
As a top placements college, we pride ourselves in providing exclusive placement training facilities. With more than four 200+ seating capacity facilities, four 60+ seating capacity training rooms, we can accommodate about 1000 students to undergo dedicated hands-on placement training at a time. With such exclusive training facilities paired with industry mentorship and high quality students,
Sri Eshwar continues to top in placements every year in Tamil Nadu!
INDUSTRY INSTITUTE INTERACTION
We, as an institution lay enormous emphasis on Industry-Institute Interaction activities. We put in  very effort that is required to provide the industry with highly qualified and skilled fresh engineers.The activities of the Industry Institute Interaction Cell include frequent visit and meeting with the industry representatives, signing of MoUs with companies, establishing and maintaining Centres of excellence, facilitating faculty summer internship with industry, inviting corporate leaders to experience our facilities and interact with our students through our Industry Connect programmes.The MoUs help in maintaining lasting relationships with the companies. We have signed MoUs with leading companies. including Mitsubishi Electric, Virtusa, Aspire Systems, VVDN, to name a few.

CENTRE FOR HIGHER EDUCATION & FOREIGN LANGUAGE
The Centre for Higher Education facilitates training and special coaching for students who wish to pursue higher studies: Special On campus coaching classes are conducted for GRE, GATE, CAT, GMAT & TOEFL to help students pursue Master’s degree in India and abroad. Systematic guidance on the various competitive examinations that would help students in getting jobs in public and private sectors, after their B.E degree. Frequent awareness sessions by experts are conducted to update the students on the prospects of pursuing higher education. Japanese and German Language Training is provided to students from first year onward which improves the prospects and proves advantageous to the students with regard to placement and higher studies in foreign countries.
